items.title: Steve Rosenberg: This year's Victory Day parade in Moscow felt very different
items.dek: The BBC's Russia editor reports from a Red Square with none of the military hardware which the Kremlin normally showcases to project power internationally.
items.body: The BBC's Russia editor reports from a Red Square with none of the military hardware which the Kremlin normally showcases to project power internationally.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Person killed after being hit by plane on runway at Denver airport
items.dek: The unidentified individual had jumped a perimeter fence two minutes before being struck by the airliner.
items.body: The unidentified individual had jumped a perimeter fence two minutes before being struck by the airliner.

items.title: WHO chief reassures Tenerife residents ahead of arrival of virus-hit cruise ship
items.dek: "This is not another Covid," Tedros Ghebreyesus tells islanders before MV Hondius docks on Sunday.
items.body: "This is not another Covid," Tedros Ghebreyesus tells islanders before MV Hondius docks on Sunday.
